text.title: Vanity Metrics Audit Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Vanity Metrics Audit.

example.scenario: Audit of 14-KPI dashboard. 5 vanity (newsletter opens, total signups, page views, social followers, NPS average). Replacements: paid conversion, activation, week-2 retention, MQL→SQL, NPS by segment. Stakeholder scripts authored. Review: 4 retired, 1 (NPS) kept tagged 'morale'.
